channel.title: Richard Tuharsky - Salesforce
channel.description: A Salesforce blog by Richard Tuharsky focused on delivering value and practical business solutions.

item.title: Simple Layout Blog Post
item.description: A simple blog post with a single-column layout and an optional cover banner.

item.title: Simple layout with cover
item.description: This is a simple layout with a cover image. The cover image is set in the front matter of the markdown file.

item.title: Sample Post about ChatGPT
item.description: An article exploring the possibilities of using ChatGPT in various applications.

item.title: Exploring ChatGPT Capabilities
item.description: Dive into the diverse capabilities of ChatGPT and learn how to leverage them in your projects.

item.title: Two columns layout with cover
item.description: This is a two columns layout with a cover image. The cover image is set in the frontmatter of the markdown file.
